name: 13_precise_source_terms
statement:
WITH source_text AS (
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_gen7' AS catalog_name, 'module' AS source_table, ModuleName AS matched_value,
       lower(concat_ws(' ', ModuleName, Name, Comments)) AS text_value
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_gen7`.dbo.module
WHERE Deleted = false
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_gen7' AS catalog_name, 'formfield' AS source_table, Name AS matched_value,
       lower(concat_ws(' ', Name, Value)) AS text_value
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_gen7`.dbo.formfield
WHERE Deleted = false
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_rms' AS catalog_name, 'module' AS source_table, ModuleName AS matched_value,
       lower(concat_ws(' ', ModuleName, Name, Comments)) AS text_value
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_rms`.dbo.module
WHERE Deleted = false
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_rms' AS catalog_name, 'formfield' AS source_table, Name AS matched_value,
       lower(concat_ws(' ', Name, Value)) AS text_value
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_rms`.dbo.formfield
WHERE Deleted = false
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_vicroads' AS catalog_name, 'module' AS source_table, ModuleName AS matched_value,
       lower(concat_ws(' ', ModuleName, Name, Comments)) AS text_value
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_vicroads`.dbo.module
WHERE Deleted = false
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_vicroads' AS catalog_name, 'formfield' AS source_table, Name AS matched_value,
       lower(concat_ws(' ', Name, Value)) AS text_value
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_vicroads`.dbo.formfield
WHERE Deleted = false
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_vns_gen7' AS catalog_name, 'module' AS source_table, ModuleName AS matched_value,
       lower(concat_ws(' ', ModuleName, Name, Comments)) AS text_value
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_vns_gen7`.dbo.module
WHERE Deleted = false
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_vns_gen7' AS catalog_name, 'formfield' AS source_table, Name AS matched_value,
       lower(concat_ws(' ', Name, Value)) AS text_value
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_vns_gen7`.dbo.formfield
WHERE Deleted = false
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_vnz_gen7' AS catalog_name, 'module' AS source_table, ModuleName AS matched_value,
       lower(concat_ws(' ', ModuleName, Name, Comments)) AS text_value
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_vnz_gen7`.dbo.module
WHERE Deleted = false
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_vnz_gen7' AS catalog_name, 'formfield' AS source_table, Name AS matched_value,
       lower(concat_ws(' ', Name, Value)) AS text_value
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_vnz_gen7`.dbo.formfield
WHERE Deleted = false
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_vsm_gen7' AS catalog_name, 'module' AS source_table, ModuleName AS matched_value,
       lower(concat_ws(' ', ModuleName, Name, Comments)) AS text_value
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_vsm_gen7`.dbo.module
WHERE Deleted = false
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_vsm_gen7' AS catalog_name, 'formfield' AS source_table, Name AS matched_value,
       lower(concat_ws(' ', Name, Value)) AS text_value
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_vsm_gen7`.dbo.formfield
WHERE Deleted = false
), matched AS (
  SELECT catalog_name, source_table, matched_value, 'OMCS' AS term FROM source_text WHERE text_value RLIKE '(^|[^a-z])omcs([^a-z]|$)'
  UNION ALL SELECT catalog_name, source_table, matched_value, 'RetinaVision/Retina' FROM source_text WHERE text_value RLIKE 'retina'
  UNION ALL SELECT catalog_name, source_table, matched_value, 'AID / automatic incident detection' FROM source_text WHERE text_value RLIKE 'aid camera|aid alert|automatic incident detection|tunnel incident detection|incident detection camera|incident detection system'
  UNION ALL SELECT catalog_name, source_table, matched_value, 'dashcam' FROM source_text WHERE text_value RLIKE 'dash.?cam|dash camera'
  UNION ALL SELECT catalog_name, source_table, matched_value, 'camera/CCTV' FROM source_text WHERE text_value RLIKE 'camera|cctv'
  UNION ALL SELECT catalog_name, source_table, matched_value, 'GPS' FROM source_text WHERE text_value RLIKE '(^|[^a-z])gps([^a-z]|$)'
  UNION ALL SELECT catalog_name, source_table, matched_value, 'jet/fan' FROM source_text WHERE text_value RLIKE 'jet fan|(^|[^a-z])fan([^a-z]|$)'
  UNION ALL SELECT catalog_name, source_table, matched_value, 'telemetry/telematics' FROM source_text WHERE text_value RLIKE 'telemetry|telematics'
  UNION ALL SELECT catalog_name, source_table, matched_value, 'vehicle stopped/location' FROM source_text WHERE text_value RLIKE 'vehicle location|vehicle stopped'
  UNION ALL SELECT catalog_name, source_table, matched_value, 'alarm' FROM source_text WHERE text_value RLIKE '(^|[^a-z])alarm|alarms|abnormalities'
  UNION ALL SELECT catalog_name, source_table, matched_value, 'dTIMS' FROM source_text WHERE text_value RLIKE 'dtims'
  UNION ALL SELECT catalog_name, source_table, matched_value, 'as-built' FROM source_text WHERE text_value RLIKE 'as-built|as built'
  UNION ALL SELECT catalog_name, source_table, matched_value, 'handover' FROM source_text WHERE text_value RLIKE 'handover'
  UNION ALL SELECT catalog_name, source_table, matched_value, 'GeoJSON' FROM source_text WHERE text_value RLIKE 'geojson'
  UNION ALL SELECT catalog_name, source_table, matched_value, 'AI defect' FROM source_text WHERE text_value RLIKE '(^|[^a-z])ai defect([^a-z]|$)|ai-detected|ai detected|artificial intelligence'
)
SELECT catalog_name, term, source_table, matched_value, COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM matched
GROUP BY catalog_name, term, source_table, matched_value
ORDER BY term, row_count DESC
LIMIT 1000

Maintenance Actions|3. Assess bearing lubrication requirements. Raise a CM and LUBRICATE if fans have operated 4000 hours since last lubrication for Exhaust fans and 8000 hours since last lubrication for Supply Fans  Inspect the lubrication plate on each fan and apply lubrication using a 475mL grease gun.  For Supply fans apply - 59mL at NDE and DE For Exhaust fans apply - 123.9mL at NDE and 88.5mL at DE  Total volume of grease to use is calculated by 1.18mL x no. of Strokes indicated on the plate.
